metadata.description: Skills and plugins for the Al Hamra Tower website — sourced from Anthropic and Vercel

plugins.name: design-skills
plugins.description: Premium UI design, canvas artwork, themes, and algorithmic art for building visually distinctive interfaces

plugins.name: react-skills
plugins.description: React and Next.js best practices, composition patterns, and React Native skills from Vercel Engineering

plugins.name: document-skills
plugins.description: Excel, Word, PowerPoint, and PDF processing capabilities for leasing brochures and investor decks

plugins.name: deployment-skills
plugins.description: Deploy to Vercel via CLI, token-based auth, git push, and environment variable management

plugins.name: web-skills
plugins.description: Web artifact builder, browser automation testing, and Claude API/SDK integration reference
